experiment_title: Electrolysis of Water and Identification of Gases

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="Electrolysis of Water and Identification of Gases" goal="To electrolyze water using a suitable electrolyte and identify the gases produced at each electrode by their physical properties." difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="hydrolyzer_1" type="beaker" capacity="250ml" />
      <Component id="stand_1" type="stand" />
      <Component id="electrode_A" type="electrode" />
      <Component id="electrode_B" type="electrode" />
      <Component id="wire_1" type="wire" />
      <Component id="wire_2" type="wire" />
      <Component id="dc_power" type="dc_power_supply" />
      <Component id="test_tube_A" type="test_tube" capacity="50ml" />
      <Component id="test_tube_B" type="test_tube" capacity="50ml" />
      <Component id="burning_wood" type="wooden_stick" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Distilled_Water" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Dilute_Sulfuric_Acid" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Sodium_Hydroxide_Solution" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="hydrolyzer_1" reagent="H2O" volume="160 ml" id="step_0" />
      <Add vessel="hydrolyzer_1" reagent="H2SO4" volume="5 ml" id="step_1" />
      
      <Attach vessel="hydrolyzer_1" support="stand_1" id="step_2" />
      <Insert tool="electrode_A" vessel="hydrolyzer_1" id="step_3" />
      <Insert tool="electrode_B" vessel="hydrolyzer_1" id="step_4" />
      <Insert tool="test_tube_A" vessel="hydrolyzer_1" id="step_5" />
      <Insert tool="test_tube_B" vessel="hydrolyzer_1" id="step_6" />
      <Attach vessel="electrode_A" support="wire_1" id="step_7" />
      <Attach vessel="electrode_B" support="wire_2" id="step_8" />
      <Attach vessel="wire_1" support="dc_power" id="step_9" />
      <Attach vessel="wire_2" support="dc_power" id="step_10" />
      <Wait time="5 min" id="step_11" />
      <Wait time="observe gas evolution in both test tubes" id="step_12" />
      <Wait time="record gas volume and appearance in both test tubes" id="step_13" />
      
      <Insert tool="burning_wood" vessel="test_tube_A" id="step_14" />
      <Wait time="observe if wood relights (Oxygen test)" id="step_15" />
      <Insert tool="burning_wood" vessel="test_tube_B" id="step_16" />
      <Wait time="observe if wood extinguishes with 'pop' sound (Hydrogen test)" id="step_17" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 配制电解液：向烧杯中加入蒸馏水和稀硫酸，制备适合电解的溶液。
组装电解装置：固定烧杯，插入电极和收集气体的试管，连接导线和直流电源，完成实验装置搭建。
进行电解并观察：通电一段时间，观察并记录两支试管中气体的产生情况和体积变化。
鉴定产物气体：用燃着的木条分别检验两支试管中的气体，判断其为氧气或氢气。
